channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Broken desk chair, 12th May
item.description:
Was left dumped outside Cleve Park school but keeps on being moved around by kids and ending up in various places surrounding the school and is now dumped on grass verge outside our house 119 Bexley Lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 133, Bexley Lane, Albany Park, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal encampment @ White Cross Stables/Bunkers Hill, 12th May
item.description:
Illegal encampment @ White Cross Stables/Bunkers Hill, Sidcup - says there are approx 4 caravans and approx 50 dogs....caller says that his wife is reporting this online but no-one is getting back to her about it...he would like some feed back
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bunkers Hill, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree does not appear stable, 12th May
item.description:
Young tree falling to one side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chieveley Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegally parking, 12th May
item.description:
People park here everyday so I will keep sending you images till it stops send them a ticket

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7-9, Moorside Road, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime hire bikes parked on very overloaded Parking bay, 12th May
item.description:
Abandoned Lime hire bikes parked on very overloaded Parking bay. Location: St Martins lane London Coliseum Theatre.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 32-35, St Martin's Lane, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: All prked on pavement, 12th May
item.description:
8/9

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Seven Sisters Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Defect pavement!, 12th May
item.description:
After the building works done on 68 Pickhurst Park, the pavement is in state that can cause problems for elderlies walking on them. This really needs urgent attention as the longer it stays like this, there's more likely someone can get injured.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62, Pickhurst Park, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car, 12th May
item.description:
This is a nice BMW but filthy and with a flat rear tyre. Been left for 5/6 weeks opposite the Copley Dene turning. This parking blocks the road when vehicles are turning into Copley. It may well be taxed BzuT is it stolen and dumped??

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westbury Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 12th May
item.description:
Dumped outside

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charles Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: DANGEROUS Sign slipped to face height, 12th May
item.description:
Looks like the sign has slipped down pole and is now at face height and is hazardous to pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Effingham Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no20, 12th May
item.description:
Street light not working

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dean Close, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping o/s 4 Aveley Close in the bushes, 12th May
item.description:
Fly tipping o/s 4 Aveley Close in the bushes Resident has reported this incident twice and both times case has been closed due to not being able to locate the fly tipping. she explained it is the bushes outside of 4 Aveley close and that they need to walk as if they are coming out of the house and take a right towards the bushes. She advised there is a mirrored glass big object and it is very sharp so whoever is picking it up would need very thick gloves.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Aveley Close, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shattered glass in front of buggy storage, 12th May
item.description:
Please help clear up the shattered glass in front of the buggy/bike storage.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sondes Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bins overflowing, 12th May
item.description:
I am a Met Police officer and have recently dealt with a complaint about rubbish at the location. On attending the venue I noticed that there were a few bins outside outside the shops, which were all over flowing. I spoke to the shops at the location who stated that the bins were for the shops and residents that live above them. Apparently the bins are always overflowing and spilling out onto the street. It appears to me that there are not enough bins for the amount of people using them. I also believe that other members of the public may be dumping additional rubbish there. The bins are so messy, that a passer-by would not hesitate to add to the mess. The bins were very unsightly and are not pleasant to walk past, let alone live next to. All the people I spoke to about the bins were not happy with the current situation.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Perry Hill, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead Fox, 12th May
item.description:
Fox laying dead on the walkway
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Court Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cover of water metre inspection pit missing, 12th May
item.description:
The black cover of the altimeter inspection pit outside excellent cuts barbers on the high Street is missing leaving a fairly large hole Someone will put their foot down this and break their ankle

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhang trees blocking paths - Highwood Av, 12th May
item.description:
On both sides of the road of Highwood avenue large trees of overhanging foliage blocking the path when walking down the road and also leaving sap upon any car park nearby their branches Trees need to be pruned back to make pathways clear and not have cars covered in tree sap, which is damaging to paint work

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Highwood Avenue, North Finchley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amount of black bin bags stacked up, 12th May
item.description:
There are a huge amount of bin bags of construction-type waste that has been there for 2 months or more. It's stacked up in a way that's a fire hazard and might fall. I saw stuff falling from it the other day. It is in the alley way next to apple repair

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Whitmore Estate, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned garden waste bin, 12th May
item.description:
Second time reporting. People keep filling it, I keep emptying it. Please can this be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Friendly Street Mews, New Cross, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle opposite number 1 vicarage road Bexley, 12th May
item.description:
Vehicle opposite number 1 vicarage road Bexley Resident advised a vehicle has been parked there since Friday and had police tape around it but now fallen off. vehicle is blocking view for cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dartford Road, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
